title: Inspection Program under 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs
content:
1. Scope and Importance of Inspection: The Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) prioritizes the protection and welfare of Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) by monitoring compliance of licensed recruitment agencies through inspection activities. Inspection functions include assisting agencies and applicants, and enforcing existing labor laws, rules, and regulations on overseas employment. POEA inspectors provide accurate information, advice, and explanations to help agencies and applicants understand relevant rules and issuances. Inspections also serve to detect and report deviant practices and irregularities to appropriate authorities for action.

2. Qualifications of Inspectors: POEA inspectors must possess dedication and commitment, observe fairness, tact, and diplomacy, maintain impartiality to ensure clear and transparent results, and strictly observe confidentiality rules. Inspector reports may only be made public if authorized by superiors for valid reasons.
